name: ExplorerProvider Must Be Inside QueryProvider
insight: Auth-resolving provider must be INSIDE QueryProvider. Otherwise queries fire before auth resolves, fail silently (caught by safeFetch), and show zero values instead of loading states.
symptoms: Stats grid shows all zeros but no errors
Network tab shows 401 on data endpoints
Explorer config succeeds but data fails
fix: Provider order: ThemeProvider > QueryProvider > ExplorerProvider > PusherProvider. ExplorerProvider calls useQueryClient() then queryClient.invalidateQueries() after auth resolves.
